title: BST Operations: Insertion, Search, Find Min/Max, Count Nodes
description: A flowchart demonstrating the core operations performed on a Binary Search Tree, showing the logical flow for inserting a node, searching for a value, finding the minimum and maximum values, and counting all nodes.
elements: Comparison Decision (e.g., current value vs. target)
relationships: Flow proceeds from Start to an initial operation
Insertion/Search paths involve comparisons that lead to left/right traversal or action
Find Min/Max algorithms follow a direct path left or right until a leaf
Count Nodes uses a recursive traversal (Post-Order) to sum left + right + 1
